== Nito SSR ♀ ==
An SSR character in a game. After the ultimate evolution, it exudes the sweet smell of money!

=== Begin Friendship ===
Find and explore Future [[Kemet]] and Dominate [[Past and Future Apostles#Kemet|Nito SSR]].
===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 13 letters back and forth, Nito will ask for 5 Lottery Tickets and rewards Lucky Voucher +50.
===★☆☆ > ★★☆===
After 7 letters back and forth, Nito will ask for 10 Lottery Tickets and rewards Lucky Voucher +100.
===★★☆ > ★★★===
After 12 letters back and forth, Nito will ask for 100 Lottery Tickets and will move in permanently with her minion, Mummy [R].

==Rent==
Nito SSR rent is collected on '''Sunday''' and is a small gacha ball on the left.

[[File:Nito rent.png|left]]
 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Mummy SR, +5 Fragments|blue}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Mummy SSR, +5 Fragments|orange}}

{{Clear}}

==Relics==
Upgrading these will earn Lottery Tickets!
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward 
|-
|★
|3 Lottery Tickets
|-
|★★
|3 Lottery Tickets
|-
|★★★
|3 Lottery Tickets
|-
|★★★★
|4 Lottery Tickets
|-
|★★★★★
|5 Lottery Tickets
|-
|★★★★★★
|6 Lottery Tickets
|}<br>

{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|1001 Nights}}<br>[[1001 Nights]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Golden Wheat}}<br>[[Golden Wheat]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Africa Star}}<br>[[Africa Star]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Lotus Chalice}}<br>[[Lotus Chalice]]
|-
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Mahakala Scroll}}<br>[[Mahakala Scroll]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Ragnarok}}<br>[[Ragnarok]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Maya Slate}}<br>[[Maya Slate]]
! style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{Reimg|Arkanrock}}<br>[[Arkanrock]]
|}


==Gatcha Master==
To max out Nito, you need not only a fat wallet but also some magical tricks
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''Research Skill Required'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!!'''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| || ||FTH +5||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2,000||FTH +10||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +0.6%
|-
|3||190 ||4,500||FTH +15||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +0.9%
|-
|4|| 200||8,000||FTH +20||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +1.2%
|-
|5||210 || 12,500||FTH +25||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18,000||FTH +30||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24,500||FTH +35||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +2.1%
|-
|8||240|| 32,000||FTH +40||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40,500 ||FTH +45||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50,000||FTH +50||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +3%
|-
|11||270||60,500 ||FTH +55||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +3.3%
|-
| 12||285||72,000||FTH +60||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84,500||FTH +65||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +3.9%
|-
|14|| 315||98,000|| FTH +70||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +4.2%
|-
|15||330 ||112,000||FTH +75||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +4.5%
|-
|16||345||123,000||FTH +80||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144,000|| FTH +85||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +5.1%
|-
|18||375 ||162,000||FTH +90||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180,000||FTH +95||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +5.7%
|-
|20||400 ||200,000||FTH +100||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +6%
|-
|21||420||220,000|| FTH +105||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +6.3%
|-
|22|| 440||242,000||FTH +110||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264,000||FTH +115|| Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +6.9%
|-
|24||480|| 285,000||FTH +120||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +7.2%
|-
|25||500 ||309,000||FTH +125||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333,000||FTH +130||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357,000||FTH +135||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +8.1%
|-
|28 ||560|| 381,000||FTH +140||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +8.4% 
|-
|29||580||405,000||FTH +145||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +8.7%
|-
|30 || 600||429,000||FTH +150||Lottery Blue Beads turn to Purple by +9%
|}

== Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Gacha Master is. 
{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!'''Lv.'''!!'''B-tad Cost'''!!'''Skill 1'''!! '''Skill 2'''
|-
|1|| || Zombie Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +100
|-
|2||4000||Zombie Minion MAX +2||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +200
|-
|3||6000||Zombie Minion MAX +3||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +300
|-
|4||8000 || Zombie Minion MAX +4||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +400
|-
|5||10000||Zombie Minion MAX +5||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +500
|-
| 6||12000|| Zombie Minion MAX +6||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +600
|-
|7||14000||Zombie Minion MAX +7|| Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +700
|-
|8||16000||Zombie Minion MAX +8||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +800
|-
|9||18000||Zombie Minion MAX +9|| Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +900
|-
|10|| 20000||Zombie Minion MAX +10||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,000
|-
|11||22000||Zombie Minion MAX +11|| Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,100
|-
|12||24000||Zombie Minion MAX +12||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,200
|-
|13 || 26000||Zombie Minion MAX +13||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,300
|-
| 14||28000||Zombie Minion MAX +14|| Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,400
|-
|15||30000||Zombie Minion MAX +15||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,500
|-
|16 ||32000|| Zombie Minion MAX +16||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,600
|-
| 17||34000||Zombie Minion MAX +17 ||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,700
|-
|18||36000||Zombie Minion MAX +18||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,800
|-
|19||38000 || Zombie Minion MAX +19||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +1,900
|-
|20||40000||Zombie Minion MAX +20||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,000
|-
|21||42000||Zombie Minion MAX +21||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,100
|-
|22||44000 ||Zombie Minion MAX +22||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,200
|-
|23|| 46000||Zombie Minion MAX +23||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,300
|-
|24||48000||Zombie Minion MAX +24||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,400
|-
|25||50000||Zombie Minion MAX +25||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,500
|-
|26||55000||Zombie Minion MAX +26||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,600
|-
| 27||60000||Zombie Minion MAX +27||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,700
|-
|28||65000||Zombie Minion MAX +28||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,800
|-
|29||70000||Zombie Minion MAX +29||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +2,900
|-
|30||75000||Zombie Minion MAX +30||Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop HP +3,000
|}

==Research Ability==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Nito SSR specializes in '''Zombie Genes''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Zombie is halved. 

{| class="sortable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Lv.!!Manuals Required!!Lv.!!Manuals Required
|-
|'''1-10'''||1||'''11-20'''||2
|-
|'''21-30'''||3||'''31-40'''||4
|-
|'''41-50'''||5||'''51-60'''||10
|-
|'''61-70'''||20||'''71-80'''||40
|-
|'''81-90'''||60||'''91-95'''||80
|-
|'''96'''||100 ||'''97'''||200
|-
|'''98'''||400|| '''99'''||600

|-
|'''100''' || 800
|}

==Minion - Mummy [R]==
A low-level card Nito summoned while working on her ascension. It turns out to be very helpful in taking care of daily life and in battles!

===Special Ability - Preservatives===
Per 10 Mummy [R]s in battle, Troop DEF +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Mummy [R]s!
{| class="wikitable"
!'''Name'''
!'''1-Star'''
!'''2-Star'''
!'''3-Star''' 
!'''4-Star''' 
!'''5-Star'''
!'''6-Star'''
|-
|{{Relink|Ancient Block|blue}}
|Mummy [R] HP +1%
|Mummy [R] DEF +1%
|Mummy [R] ATK +1%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|{{Relink|Dendera Tablet|blue}}
| Mummy [R] HP +1%
| Mummy [R] DEF +1%
| Mummy [R] ATK +1%
| Mummy [R] RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
|{{Relink|Fallen Lucifer|purple}}
|Mummy [R] HP +2%
|Mummy [R] DEF +2% 
|Mummy [R] ATK +2%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +2%
|Mummy [R] All Stats +3%
|
|-
|{{Relink|Chinchorro Mummy|purple}}
|Mummy [R] HP +2%
|Mummy [R] DEF +2%
|Mummy [R] ATK +2%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +2%
|Mummy [R] All Stats +3%
|
|-
|{{Relink|Tutankhamun Mask|orange}}
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|Mummy [R] RUSH +4%
|-
|{{Relink|Mummy of Ramesses|orange}}
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|Mummy [R] DEF +4%
|-
|{{Relink|Scale of Anubis|orange}}
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|Mummy [R] HP +4%
|-
|{{Relink|The Black Book|orange}}
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|Mummy [R] ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
